4 = standby

tags.expression:
case(
{[.]Mode},
0,"Not Configured",
1,"Tank Filling",
2,"Shutdown-Network",
3,"Full Manual Control",
4, "Standby",
5, "Online (running)",
6, "Online (filling)",
7, "Filling",
8, "Shutdown -fault",
9, "Group Standby",
10, "Not Used",
11, "Not Used",
12, "Tank Filling",
"Unknown")
